title: theme — settings (meta)
description: Settings the theme module publishes about itself. Consumed by the settings platform via #[AsSetting] discovery. Group covers rollback retention override + accessibility audit toggle + auto-provision-default-theme behavior on TenantProvisioned.

groups.label: Theme platform
groups.description: Configuration for the design token substrate — rollback retention, accessibility audit cadence, default theme on tenant provisioning.

sections.label: Rollback
sections.description: How many historical themes to retain for rollback.

fields.name: rollback_retention_override
fields.label: Rollback retention (activations)
fields.helpText: Empty = follow entitlement default (5 for standard, 20 for theme_rollback_extended tenants). Explicit value overrides — capped at entitlement max.

fields.name: audit_on_activate
fields.label: Audit on activate
fields.helpText: Run the ContrastAuditor after every ThemeActivated. Findings surface as ThemeAccessibilityRecommendationNotification.

sections.label: Auto-provisioning
sections.description: Default theme seeded when a new tenant is provisioned.

fields.name: default_preset_slug
fields.label: Default preset for new tenants
fields.helpText: SeedDefaultThemeForNewTenant reads this on TenantProvisioned to pick which preset the new tenant's theme references.
